rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARY JEAN DAVIS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although no courtesy copy of the proof of service of notice of the second amended petition was provided as required by LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7 B. and C., the date the will was admitted was 6/26/19, not 6/27/19, the attorney never filed a creditor's claim for fees, as alleged in paragraph 5, the statutory fee base is mathematically incorrect, and the total deductions shown on the Second Amended Schedule 1 is incorrect, although the net cash is correct. A supplemental accounting of the reserve will be required unless waived by the residuary beneficiary.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MUI TAI VONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE RUTH YUEN 2002 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Modifying Irrevocable Trust
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) Is San Francisco the proper venue under Probate Code sections 17005(a)(1) and 17002 ? The trustee resides in Colorado, but alleges that the principal place of administration of the trust is located in San Francisco because the day-to-day administration of the trust will be conducted in San Francisco. 2) The petition requests modification of a distribution provision of an irrevocable trust established by a deceased settlor. The proposed modification will give the petitioner as trustee sole and absolute discretion to determine distribution of income and principal of the trust for the beneficiary receiving needs-based public benefits. No declaration from the drafting attorney as to the settlor's intent, circumstances known to or anticipated by her at the time of execution of the trust instrument, and whether the attorney drafted the distribution provision in error has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER WILLIAM PYBUS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The published notice of this petition included the following statement: "The petition requests the decedent's will and codicils, if any, be admitted to probate. The will and any codicils are available for examination in the file kept by the court." The petition alleges that the decedent died intestate and does not request that the decedent's will and codicils, if any, be admitted to probate. 2) The petitioner is a resident of Florida. The petition requests that the requirement of a bond be waived. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.
